title: piper tumidonodosum
side_effects: Piper tumidonodosum can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and skin irritation. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, improper use of Piper tumidonodosum may cause respiratory problems, including difficulty breathing and coughing. If not handled correctly, the plant can also trigger allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling.
